name: Block trackers
description: Blocks analytics and tracking. The app routes every event through the util.n1 dispatcher, which forwards each one to both Firebase Analytics and Facebook (AppEventsLogger). This neutralizes that dispatcher so no tracking event is ever sent.

name: Premium
description: Unlocks premium. Makes the app's session helper report a valid, active subscription so locked content and premium-only features become available, and removes ads. Note: media that the server streams and authorizes per-account may still depend on the backend honouring the account.
